mapper.sql: d.dept_id AS deptId, d.dept_name AS deptName, d.parent_id AS parentDeptId, d.parent_name AS parentDeptName, d.dept_type AS deptType, CASE d.dept_type WHEN 1 THEN '科室' WHEN 2 THEN '病区' WHEN 3 THEN '居家站点' ELSE '未知' END AS deptTypeText, d.dept_type AS deptLevel, CASE d.dept_type WHEN 1 THEN '科室' WHEN 2 THEN '病区' WHEN 3 THEN '居家站点' ELSE '未知' END AS deptLevelText, ( SELECT su.real_name FROM sys_user su WHERE su.dept_id = d.dept_id AND su.is_deleted = 0 AND su.role_name LIKE '%主任%' ORDER BY su.user_id ASC LIMIT 1 ) AS director, ( SELECT su.phone FROM sys_user su WHERE su.dept_id = d.dept_id AND su.is_deleted = 0 AND su.role_name LIKE '%主任%' ORDER BY su.user_id ASC LIMIT 1 ) AS phone, ( SELECT su.real_name FROM sys_user su WHERE su.dept_id = d.dept_id AND su.is_deleted = 0 AND su.role_name LIKE '%主任%' ORDER BY su.user_id ASC LIMIT 1 ) AS deptDirector, ( SELECT su.phone FROM sys_user su WHERE su.dept_id = d.dept_id AND su.is_deleted = 0 AND su.role_name LIKE '%主任%' ORDER BY su.user_id ASC LIMIT 1 ) AS contactPhone, CASE WHEN INSTR(d.dept_code, '|') > 0 THEN SUBSTRING(d.dept_code, INSTR(d.dept_code, '|') + 1) ELSE NULL END AS location, d.status AS status, CASE d.status WHEN 1 THEN '启用' WHEN 0 THEN '禁用' ELSE '未知' END AS statusText, d.create_time AS createTime, d.update_time AS updateTime
mapper.select: SELECT d.dept_id AS deptId, d.parent_id AS parentDeptId, d.dept_name AS deptName FROM sys_department d WHERE d.is_deleted = 0 AND d.status = 1 ORDER BY d.sort ASC, d.dept_id ASC
SELECT d.dept_id AS deptId, d.parent_id AS parentDeptId, d.dept_name AS deptName FROM sys_department d WHERE d.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY d.sort ASC, d.dept_id ASC
SELECT d.dept_name FROM sys_department d WHERE d.dept_id = #{deptId} AND d.is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT d.dept_code FROM sys_department d WHERE d.dept_id = #{deptId} AND d.is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT d.dept_id FROM sys_department d WHERE d.dept_id <= #{maxAllowedId} ORDER BY d.dept_id DESC LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_department ( dept_id, parent_id, parent_name, dept_name, dept_code, dept_type, sort, status, is_deleted ) VALUES ( #{deptId}, #{parentId}, #{parentName}, #{deptName}, #{deptCode}, #{deptType}, #{sort}, #{status}, #{isDeleted} )
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_department SET parent_id = #{parentId}, parent_name = #{parentName}, dept_name = #{deptName}, dept_code = #{deptCode}, dept_type = #{deptType}, status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE dept_id = #{deptId} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM sys_department d WHERE d.dept_id = #{deptId} AND d.is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM sys_department d WHERE d.dept_id = #{deptId} AND d.is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM sys_department d WHERE d.parent_id = #{deptId} AND d.is_deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM sys_user u WHERE u.dept_id = #{deptId} AND u.is_deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM sys_bed b INNER JOIN sys_ward w ON b.ward_id = w.ward_id WHERE w.dept_id = #{deptId} AND w.is_deleted = 0 AND b.is_deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ecg_device ed WHERE ed.bind_dept_id = #{deptId} AND ed.is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_department SET is_deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE dept_id = #{deptId} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_department SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE dept_id = #{deptId} AND is_deleted = 0

UPDATE sys_user SET real_name = CASE WHEN #{deptDirector} IS NULL OR #{deptDirector} = '' THEN real_name ELSE #{deptDirector} END, phone = CASE WHEN #{contactPhone} IS NULL OR #{contactPhone} = '' THEN phone ELSE #{contactPhone} END, update_time = NOW() WHERE dept_id = #{deptId} AND is_deleted = 0 AND role_name LIKE '%主任%' ORDER BY user_id ASC LIMIT 1
